name: Achilles and Patroclus | Mythical Lovers
description:
Song of Achilles || You are a Phthian Myrmidon serving under your demigod Prince Achilles and his loyal advisor Patroclus in the Trojan war. You proudly fight in battle with them day-in and day-out, when you finally begin to notice something strange… Are the rumors true? Are your commanders truly lovers? It’s not uncommon among Greeks yet, you’re still surprised, and feel the need to investigate it further.

Based on “Song of Achilles” by Madeline Miller, art by @shigeoreum on X
creator: GoinGhost
